news:news.news:title: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule in Hungary ended with a significant electoral defeat, while global tensions rise with Iran's record executions and violence in Nigeria.
news:news.news:keywords: Hungary election results, Iran human rights violations, Peru election issues, global political shifts, violence in Nigeria

news:news.news:title: Oil prices surged past $100 a barrel amid geopolitical tensions, while US-Iran talks collapse raised fears of a prolonged energy crisis.
news:news.news:keywords: oil price surge implications, impact of US-Iran talks collapse, data breach at Booking.com, Texas investment strategies, Bernie Sanders economic warnings

news:news.news:title: Technology news today highlights innovations in gaming, AI, and smart home devices, alongside significant changes in user verification and media business models.
news:news.news:keywords: AI advancements in business, Roblox age verification changes, SwitchBot product updates, Neuralink's challenges, Microsoft gaming innovations

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy won the Masters for the second consecutive year, while the NBA playoffs are set to begin with significant coaching changes and player injuries.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA playoffs preview, Rory McIlroy Masters victory, coaching changes in NBA, NFL draft prospects, player injuries in sports

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a new gum disease treatment, the impact of climate change on gray whales, and insights into human genetics and lifespan.
news:news.news:keywords: health advancements, climate change impact, genetics and lifespan, plant biology, Neanderthal studies

news:news.news:title: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule in Hungary ends with a significant election defeat, while global tensions rise over U.S. plans to blockade Iranian ports.
news:news.news:keywords: Hungary election results, U.S. Iran tensions, Bollywood news, Nigerian air strike, Haitian tourist tragedy

news:news.news:title: The collapse of US-Iran talks raises concerns over rising energy prices, while Texas seeks to attract investment with a new London office.
news:news.news:keywords: US-Iran energy negotiations, Texas investment strategies, US inflation trends, job market challenges in Washington DC, Bernie Sanders economic warnings

news:news.news:title: Rockstar Games confirmed a data breach with no expected impact, while the Netherlands became the first European country to approve Tesla's Full Self-Driving technology.
news:news.news:keywords: data breach impact on gaming, Tesla Full Self-Driving approval, Nintendo Switch 2 promotional offers, AI coding competition, reviews of tech gadgets

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy won his second consecutive Masters title, while Doc Rivers is leaving the Bucks and the NBA playoffs are set to begin.
news:news.news:keywords: Rory McIlroy Masters victory analysis, Doc Rivers Bucks coaching change, NBA playoffs 2026 preview, impact of injuries in sports, Kevin Garnett Timberwolves return

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into human history, health, and the universe, including Neanderthal interactions and advancements in cancer treatment.
news:news.news:keywords: Neanderthal and Homo sapiens interactions, Eating habits and weight management, Airborne toxins in the U.S., Vitamin B1 research breakthrough, Alzheimer's early detection through smell

news:news.news:title: Viktor Orbán Ousted After 16 Years as U.S. Plans Iranian Blockade Sparks Global Tensions
